templates.nlQuery: Show me apartments in Zurich up to 6k with min 2 rooms
templates.sql: SELECT image_gcs_uri, id, title, description, bedrooms, price, city, country, canton FROM property_listings WHERE LOWER(city) = LOWER('Zurich') AND price <= 6000 AND bedrooms >= 2 LIMIT 25;
templates.intent: Find apartments filtered strictly by city, price, and room count without semantic search
templates.manifest: Find property listings filtered by city, price, and bedroom count

parameterized.parameterized_intent: Show me apartments in $1 up to $2 with min $3 rooms
parameterized.parameterized_sql: SELECT image_gcs_uri, id, title, description, bedrooms, price, city, country, canton FROM property_listings WHERE LOWER(city) = LOWER($1) AND price <= $2 AND bedrooms >= $3 LIMIT 25;

templates.sql: SELECT image_gcs_uri, id, title, description, bedrooms, price, city, country, canton FROM property_listings ORDER BY (0.6 * COSINE_DISTANCE(description_embedding, (SELECT embeddings.values FROM ML.PREDICT(MODEL property_text_embedding_model, (SELECT 'Lovely wooden cabin' AS content)))) + 0.4 * COSINE_DISTANCE(image_embedding, (SELECT textEmbedding FROM ML.PREDICT(MODEL property_multimodal_text_model, (SELECT 'Lovely wooden cabin' AS text))))) ASC LIMIT 25;
templates.intent: Search for properties based solely on semantic and visual similarity to a text description
templates.manifest: Find property listings ordered by semantic similarity to a search phrase

parameterized.parameterized_sql: SELECT image_gcs_uri, id, title, description, bedrooms, price, city, country, canton FROM property_listings ORDER BY (0.6 * COSINE_DISTANCE(description_embedding, (SELECT embeddings.values FROM ML.PREDICT(MODEL property_text_embedding_model, (SELECT $1 AS content)))) + 0.4 * COSINE_DISTANCE(image_embedding, (SELECT textEmbedding FROM ML.PREDICT(MODEL property_multimodal_text_model, (SELECT $1 AS text))))) ASC LIMIT 25;

templates.nlQuery: Show me modern apartments in Zurich with industrial look up to 6k with min 2 rooms
templates.sql: SELECT image_gcs_uri, id, title, description, bedrooms, price, city, country, canton FROM property_listings WHERE LOWER(city) = LOWER('Zurich') AND price <= 6000 AND bedrooms >= 2 ORDER BY (0.6 * COSINE_DISTANCE(description_embedding, (SELECT embeddings.values FROM ML.PREDICT(MODEL property_text_embedding_model, (SELECT 'modern apartments with industrial look' AS content)))) + 0.4 * COSINE_DISTANCE(image_embedding, (SELECT textEmbedding FROM ML.PREDICT(MODEL property_multimodal_text_model, (SELECT 'modern apartments with industrial look' AS text))))) ASC LIMIT 25;
templates.intent: Find apartments in a specific city with price and room constraints, ordered by visual and semantic similarity to a description
templates.manifest: Find property listings in a given city with price and room limits, ordered by semantic similarity to a search phrase

parameterized.parameterized_intent: Show me $1 in $2 up to $3 with min $4 rooms
parameterized.parameterized_sql: SELECT image_gcs_uri, id, title, description, bedrooms, price, city, country, canton FROM property_listings WHERE LOWER(city) = LOWER($2) AND price <= $3 AND bedrooms >= $4 ORDER BY (0.6 * COSINE_DISTANCE(description_embedding, (SELECT embeddings.values FROM ML.PREDICT(MODEL property_text_embedding_model, (SELECT $1 AS content)))) + 0.4 * COSINE_DISTANCE(image_embedding, (SELECT textEmbedding FROM ML.PREDICT(MODEL property_multimodal_text_model, (SELECT $1 AS text))))) ASC LIMIT 25;
